statement.en: Characterising the extracellular matrix properties of the retina and how they change with age.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Paper dated 2026-04-25 (future date) classified as cs.AI but concerns biological/biomedical research (retinal extracellular matrix aging). Metadata inconsistency suggests provisional/preprint status. Core claims about ECM properties and age-related changes are empirically testable but characterization methods and findings are not yet established in the provided abstract.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 時間とともに弾性が衰え、光の通路が曲がっていく。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 同心円が徐々に濁り、構造の対称性が時間に蝕まれていく風景。
